name: Halibut Baked with Herbs
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Butter or margarine, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe fish with a damp cloth.
2. Dot the fish with butter and sprinkle lemon juice over all.
3. Choose either Herb Mix No. 1 or Herb Mix No. 2.
- For Herb Mix No. 1: Sprinkle onion flakes (rehydrated and drained) over the top of the fish. Combine the remaining herbs/spices and sprinkle on halibut. Let stand for 10 minutes to absorb the flavors.
- For Herb Mix No. 2: Mix all ingredients together well and sprinkle over fish; use only enough to lightly cover fish or it will taste dry. (The remaining mix will store well in a tightly covered jar in the refrigerator.)
4. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
5. Serve garnished with lemon wedge and parsley sprigs.
Serves 6.
